posts.author: rk1771
posts.text: Anlon Technology Solutions Limited (ANLON) recently approved a significant fundraising move via a preferential issue . Following a board meeting on May 1, 2026 , the company outlined plans to strengthen its capital base to support its engineering and airport services operations. Issue Size: Up to 1,254,400 equity shares of face value ₹10 each. Issue Price: Fixed at ₹398.50 per share (which includes a premium of ₹388.50). Target Investors: The shares are to be issued on a preferential basis to Non-Promoter category investors. Several specialized funds are picking up significant portions of the…

posts.text: ANLON_01052026192016_OUTCOME_01052026.pdf (378.2 KB) Two new update, CEO of rosenbauer first time visit plant & company doing fund rise of 50 cr. Does this preferential amount would be use for funding as a working capital of big domestic or export orders or they are plannig foreign service centre opening ?

posts.author: Niraj_Punjkaran
posts.text: Encouraging updated……the tech collaborations are indeed worth noting…….but The order book is equivalent to just last year’s revenue…….. And it includes spares, AMC etc Will we see an acceleration in orders in coming days……. Seen against a backdrop of current predicament faced by the govt on capex, considering likely upgrades in subsidy quotas to cover price hikes in general population centric commodities fuel, fertilizers etc……. How do we see the future growth panning out……request elders to help understand.

posts.author: Aakash_Javeri
posts.text: The year 2026 is another significant year for us, as our long-term associates, M/S ROSENBAUER International A.G Austria, has made a strategic decision to join hands with Anlon for getting a series of fire engines manufactured from Anlon’s Bangalore facility. This key step extends Anlon’s reach beyond the borders of India. https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/ANLON_23042026180308_Anlon-Business_Update_Final.pdf
